headline: Taber, AB Named Winner of Kraft Hockeyville 2026
summary: TORONTO, April 05, 2026--Kraft Heinz, in partnership with the National Hockey League (NHLВ®) and the National Hockey League Players' Association (NHLPA), is pleased to announce that Taber, Alberta has been named the winner of Kraft Hockeyville 2026.
